capabilitySheet.evidenceRef: docs/openrouter-integration-evidence/2026-06-26-alt-providers.json call_deepinfra_zdr_probe (HTTP 200, body.provider='DeepInfra') + call_deepinfra_json_schema_probe (HTTP 200, structured-output mode supported, body parsed conforming to schema). ZDR posture sent: zdr=true, data_collection=deny, allow_fallbacks=false. ITOTORI-238 evidence-validation.

notes: ITOTORI-238 v0.3 shape (was ITOTORI-234 v0.2). Single (modelId, providerId) primary pair pinned for every stage of the agentic loop; v0.3 adds an EXPLICIT alternateProviders[] list + failoverPredicate to handle the Fireworks-side HTTP 429 quota issue that blocked 3/6 UTSUSHI-231 reruns. The alternate `(deepseek/deepseek-v4-flash, deepinfra)` was evidence-validated for ZDR posture AND json_schema structured outputs against Trevor's account on 2026-06-26 — see docs/openrouter-integration-evidence/2026-06-26-alt-providers.json. failoverPredicate is the literal 'http_429_from_primary': the orchestrator advances to the next alternate ONLY when the primary returns HTTP 429. Any other failure (pair_mismatch, provider_response_invalid, non-429 HTTP error, etc.) surfaces immediately — silent provider swap is forbidden (audit-focus 3). The enUsSentinel substring is woven into the translation prompt so the patched Seen.txt's replay produces a TextLine whose bodyUtf8 contains the substring verbatim. ASCII-only by deliberate choice: the leading SJIS bracket required by the KAIFUU-191 lexer is wrapped around the sentinel by the patch step, not by the prompt. Per-stage zdr / fallbackModels / seed / maxPriceUsd are intentionally omitted: the parser fills in canonical defaults. Operator-level zdr downgrades require OPENROUTER_ZDR_DOWNGRADE; no file-level escape hatch.
